item.title: 3 Types of Litter Boxes for Cats-Which One is Right for Your Furry Friend
item.description: As a cat owner, providing the best possible care for your feline companion is a top priority. One of the most important aspects of cat care is ensuring that your cat has a clean and comfortable litter box.
